title: Crispy Herbal Canadian Stir-fry
description: A cozy herbal dish featuring pecorino cheese in a crispy and Paleo-friendly stir-fry.

ingredients.name: boneless chicken breast
ingredients.notes: skin-on and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Mix the pecorino cheese with a pinch of salt and pepper to taste.
Dip chicken pieces in the cheese mixture, then coat evenly with egg whites for crispy texture when fried.
Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add chicken pieces and fry until golden brown on both sides (approximately 6 minutes per side).
Remove chicken from pan and set aside. Heat remaining oil in the same pan if needed, add bell peppers, onions, and zucchini. Stir-fry for about 5 minutes.
Return chicken to the pan along with a few spoonfuls of paleo-friendly soy sauce or tamari. Mix well until all ingredients are coated evenly.
Serve hot as an accompaniment to any Paleo meal.
